nodes.name: bz-product-list
nodes.notes: GET /bz-product-list?talent_id=123 — List all products for a talent (public, sorted by sort_order)

nodes.name: bz-product-upsert
nodes.notes: POST /bz-product-upsert — Create or update a product. Body: { talent_id, name, description?, price?, price_label?, image_url?, in_stock?, id? (for update) }. Requires JWT.

nodes.name: bz-product-delete
nodes.notes: POST /bz-product-delete — Delete a product. Body: { id }. Requires JWT.

nodes.name: bz-product-reorder
nodes.notes: POST /bz-product-reorder — Reorder a product. Body: { id, sort_order }. Requires JWT.

nodes.name: bz-product-image
nodes.notes: POST /bz-product-image — Upload product image. Multipart form with 'file' field. Returns { url }. Requires JWT.

meta.description: Shop CRUD webhooks for Broodz product listings. 5 endpoints: list, upsert, delete, reorder, image upload.

sql.list: SELECT * FROM products WHERE talent_id = $1 ORDER BY sort_order, id
sql.upsert_insert: INSERT INTO products (talent_id, name, description, price, price_label, image_url, in_stock, sort_order) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, COALESCE((SELECT MAX(sort_order) FROM products WHERE talent_id = $1), 0) + 1) RETURNING *
sql.upsert_update: UPDATE products SET name = $2, description = $3, price = $4, price_label = $5, image_url = $6, in_stock = $7, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1 RETURNING *
sql.reorder: UPDATE products SET sort_order = $2 WHERE id = $1
